concerns.text: FR-002 requires a held-out validation split to verify ≥90% rule coverage. No task exists to explicitly split `failure_cases.json` into training and validation sets before T013 (distillation) runs. T014 measures coverage but lacks the input partition defined by the spec.

SC-003 requires the analysis to explicitly state whether the interaction term is significant (p < 0.05). Task T026 outputs the p-value to JSON, but no task exists to programmatically compare this against the alpha threshold and generate the required boolean flag or narrative conclusion for the final report.

SC-005 requires measuring 'total compute time and peak memory usage of the entire experiment' against CI limits. Task T030 (which covers this) is marked `[~]` (removed/incomplete) and explicitly excludes baseline resource logging, leaving the 'entire experiment' metric unmeasured.

Plan.md and Spec.md require schema contracts (`failure_case.schema.yaml`, etc.) in `contracts/`. Task T004 is marked `[ ]` (unchecked) and is a prerequisite for T011b and T015. Without this task completion, schema validation tasks cannot execute.

FR-001 requires outputting a labeled dataset to `data/derived/failure_cases.json`. Task T011b is marked `[ ]` (unchecked) and is the specific task for this artifact generation. Without it, downstream tasks (T019a, T027) lack input data.

FR-004 requires a stratified random sample of 100 tasks. Task T019a (stratified selection) is marked `[X]` but T022 (merging baseline logs with strict ID matching) is marked `[ ]`. Without T022, the paired comparison required by FR-004 and SC-002 cannot be performed.

SC-004 requires categorizing failed pivots into 'Coverage Gap' vs 'Distillation Error'. Task T027b (Execute & Populate) is marked `[X]`, but T028 (ensure use of ground-truth resolution for arbitration) is marked `[ ]`. The logic in T027b depends on T028's validation to be correct per FR-007.
